message:
refactor(tldr-synergy): support multiple concurrent card highlights

Changed from single cardHighlightRef to cardHighlightRefs array to
support highlighting multiple related cards simultaneously when a
diagram node is activated.

Key changes:
- cardHighlightRef.current → cardHighlightRefs.current (array)
- clearCardHighlight now iterates over all highlighted elements
- applyNodeHighlight builds highlightTargets array before applying
  ring/highlight classes

This enables visual grouping of related tool cards when hovering
diagram nodes that represent multiple interconnected tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
